description: This Java class 'JwtService' provides functionality for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) used for authentication and authorization in a Spring Boot application. It handles secret key initialization, token issuance for users, token parsing and validation, and extracting user IDs from claims.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: A service class responsible for generating and validating JWT tokens for users, ensuring secure token creation with a secret key, and extracting user-related data from tokens.

methods.name: JwtService
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the JwtService with properties, validates the secret key, and sets up the signing key.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a JWT token for a given user, embedding user ID, email, and roles in the token claims.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Parses and validates a JWT token to extract claims, verifying issuer and signature.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts and returns the user UUID from the token claims.
